item.title: ANALYSIS-US defense stocks see no Iran war lift after early surge
item.author: EBR European Business Report
item.description: The sluggish performance, strategists said, signaled investors were unwinding positions after a strong run this year and does not reflect fading demand or doubts about longer-term defense spending. "A lot of conflict premium was in their valuations," said David Bianco, Americas chief investment officer at German asset manager DWS.
